zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana Paulet於大約1449年出生在英國薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治時，她的父親Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton51歲，母親Elizabeth Denebaud36歲。她於1471年之前與Henry Hull結婚。她去世於1521年在英國戴文培維勒爾享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Paulet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of several places called Paules in the provinces of Zaragoza and Huesca in Aragon, and Albacete.

variants.name: Pavlis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Despina, Nikolaos, Vasilios.
Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Pavlos (see Paul ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Compare Paules and Paulis .
Czech and Slovak (also Pavliš); Croatian (Pavliš): derivative of the personal name Pavel (Slovak commonly Pavol, Croatian commonly Pavao), an equivalent of Paul . Compare Paulis .

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana Paulet was born about 1449, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, her father, Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton, was 51 and her mother, Elizabeth Denebaud, was 36. She married Henry Hull before 1471. She died in 1521, in Peverell, Devon, England, at the age of 73.

Elle a épousé Henry Hull avant 1471. Elle est décédée en 1521, à Peverell, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Paulet(이)가 대략 1449년 영국 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Denebaud(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1471년 이전 Henry Hull(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1521년 영국 데폰 p에버에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christiana Paulet nasceu aproximadamente 1449, em Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Denebaud, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Hull antes 1471. Ela faleceu em 1521, em Peverell, Devon, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana Paulet родилась около 1449 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Denebaud, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Hull перед 1471 г. Она умерла в 1521 г. в местности пивирэлл, девон, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.
